expectations.text: States the meeting type / altitude it sized the room for (design / working / maker level)
expectations.evidence: Picks reasonable people but does not size by altitude explicitly.

expectations.text: Surfaces Ahmed Benali (Integration Architect) and Bram Hendriks (Domain Architect, Payments) as hands-on design participants
Aisha Khan (Tribe Lead, Payments) is included at a working-relevant score, NOT dropped for being too junior
Does not elevate a person to the top purely on seniority; a 'Head of' is only high if their discipline is core to this design
Flags that the actual hands-on builders (unprofiled reports such as Maria Oliveira / Jonas Bakker) are missing from the wiki
expectations.evidence: Noted hands-on engineers couldn't be evaluated.

expectations.text: Every ranked stakeholder has a 1-10 score and a rationale, ordered highest first
No fabricated people in the ranked list (unprofiled wiki-link people only in the gap note)
